title: TraceEvent
description: One line of a semantic trace NDJSON file. Traces have two layers: RAW (everything captured) and NORMALIZED (post trace-normalizer; what trace.diff consumes). The `layer` field distinguishes them.

t.description: ms since scenario start (informational; normalized diffs ignore absolute time)

stepIndex.description: Index into the scenario's userSteps that this event occurred under

payload.description: Kind-specific. Conventions: net.* {method, path, query, status, bodyHash}; ngjs.watch-fire {expr, scopeId, oldHash, newHash}; ngjs.scope-event {name, direction: emit|broadcast, payloadHash, listenerCount}; ngjs.compile {templateHash, source: string|url}; domain.event {name, payload}; aria.milestone {snapshotHash, delta}; focus.change {fromRole+name, toRole+name}; ngjs.element-plugin-call {plugin, method, selectorHint}.

semanticKey.description: Normalizer-assigned stable key used by trace.diff for alignment, e.g. 'net:GET:/api/invoices?status=paid' or 'domain:invoiceFilterChanged'. Absent on raw layer.
